mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (nickname, gender, age, username, password, phone, avatar, status, role, noshow_count, created_at) VALUES (#{nickname}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{role}, #{noshowCount}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, avatar = #{avatar}, status = #{status}, role = #{role}, noshow_count = #{noshowCount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM users
AND (nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id DESC
